title: Babel #0894
definition:
Babel or Babylon = "confusion (by mixing)"

 1) Babel or Babylon, the ancient site and/or capital of
    Babylonia (modern Hillah) situated on the Euphrates
nasbUsage:
Definition: Babel or Babylon = "confusion (by mixing)"

 1) Babel or Babylon, the ancient site and/or capital of
    Babylonia (modern Hillah) situated on the Euphrates

    NASB:  an E. Mediterranean empire and its capital city
